prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.5L TFSI EA855 (Audi RS3 8V) with a custom bellhousing adapter (Kevlar-reinforced, fabricated by 034 Motorsport) to mate with the Type 2's transaxle. Retain the original air-cooled cooling system but integrate a custom dual-core aluminum radiator (Setrab 270-series) with electric fans (SPAL 16-inch) mounted behind the rear bench seat. Turbocharged setup includes a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbo (1.05 A/R, .82 compressor) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust (custom-fabricated by MagnaFlow) terminating in a 4-2-1 header (stainless 304, 1.75-inch primaries) and a Borla Pro XS muffler (2.5-inch outlet).

Fuel system upgrade with a Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump (mounted externally in a custom aluminum surge tank, fabricated by Radium Engineering) feeding dual 1,000cc/min ID1000 injectors (Injector Dynamics) controlled by a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU (custom harness by Haltech). Ignition system includes a custom coil-on-plug setup (AEM CDI coils) with NGK R7437-10 iridium spark plugs (gapped at 0.028").

Suspension overhaul with a custom IRS (Independent Rear Suspension) conversion using Porsche 911 (993) trailing arms (polyurethane-bushed, Energy Suspension) and custom-fabricated subframe mounts (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, designed by Airkewld). Front suspension features custom tubular control arms (fabricated by Heidts) with adjustable coilovers (Ohlins Road & Track DFV, 400lb/in springs) and polygraphite bushings (SuperPro). Braking system includes Wilwood Dynalite 6-piston calipers (13-inch rotors, slotted) up front and 4-piston calipers (12-inch rotors) in the rear, with stainless steel braided lines (Goodridge) and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using hand-fabricated steel fenders (1.5-inch wider than stock, designed by RWB Japan) with integrated LED turn signals (Luxx Hella-style, amber). Front bumper replaced with a custom carbon fiber unit (fabricated by Seibon) featuring a central tow hook (AP Racing) and integrated fog lights (Morimoto XB LED, 5,000K). Rear bumper modified to accommodate a custom dual-exit exhaust (stainless 304, 3-inch diameter) with titanium tips (Burns Stainless).

Roof chop (1.5 inches) with a custom sunroof delete panel (aluminum, powder-coated matte black) and a rear spoiler (carbon fiber, designed by Rocket Bunny) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals (CNC-machined by Varis). Side windows replaced with custom-fabricated polycarbonate units (1/4-inch thick, scratch-resistant coating by 3M) with integrated sliding vents (fabricated by Vintage Air).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with custom Recaro SRD seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara inserts) mounted on custom aluminum sliders (fabricated by Bride). Dashboard replaced with a custom carbon fiber unit (fabricated by Carbon Creations) housing a digital gauge cluster (AEM CD-7) and a custom steering wheel (Nardi 350mm, suede-wrapped with a quick-release hub by NRG). Floor pans replaced with custom aluminum units (TIG-welded, powder-coated) and sound deadening (Dynamat Xtreme) applied throughout.
